mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TW_EVAL ORDER BY EVAL_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TW_EVAL (HOSP_CD, EVAL_YEAR, EVAL_CYCLE, EVAL_STATUS, START_DT, END_DT, REG_USER) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{evalYear}, #{evalCycle}, '준비', #{startDt}, #{endDt}, #{regUser})
INSERT INTO TW_EVAL_DTL (EVAL_ID, NODE_ID, SCORE, GRADE, EVIDENCE, NOTE, EVAL_USER, EVAL_DT) VALUES (#{evalId}, #{nodeId}, #{score}, #{grade}, #{evidence}, #{note}, #{evalUser}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT t.NODE_ID , t.NODE_NM , t.PARENT_ID , IFNULL(AVG(ed.SCORE), 0) AS domainScore , COUNT(ed.DTL_ID) AS totalCount FROM TW_TREE t LEFT JOIN TW_EVAL_DTL ed ON t.NODE_ID = ed.NODE_ID AND ed.EVAL_ID = #{evalId} WHERE t.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY t.NODE_ID, t.NODE_NM, t.PARENT_ID ORDER BY t.SORT_ORD
